questions: Ku mund ta gjej Universitetin POLIS?
answer: Universiteti POLIS ndodhet ne Rr. Bylis 12, ne Autostraden Tirane-Durres, Km 5, ne zonen e Kasharit, ne Tirane, Shqiperi.
answer_en: POLIS University is located at Rr. Bylis 12, on the Tirana-Durres Highway, Km 5, in the Kashar area, Tirana, Albania.

questions: Cili eshte kodi postar i Universitetit POLIS?
What is the postal code of POLIS University?
answer: Kodi postar i Universitetit POLIS eshte 1051 dhe kutia postare eshte 2995, Tirane, Shqiperi.
answer_en: The postal code of POLIS University is 1051 and the P.O. Box is 2995, Tirana, Albania.

questions: Cilat jane numrat e telefonit te Universitetit POLIS?
answer: Numrat zyrtare te telefonit jane +355 4 240 74 20 dhe +355 4 240 74 21.
answer_en: The official phone numbers are +355 4 240 74 20 and +355 4 240 74 21.

questions: Si mund te kontaktoj Zyren e Pranimeve?
Si mund te flas me admissions?
answer: Zyra e Pranimeve mund te kontaktohet ne numrat +355 69 40 88 111 dhe +355 69 40 61 339.
answer_en: The Admissions Office can be contacted at +355 69 40 88 111 and +355 69 40 61 339.

questions: Cfare dokumentesh duhen per regjistrim ne POLIS?
Cfare duhet per tu regjistruar ne POLIS?
keywords: dokumentet per tu futur ne polis
answer: Per regjistrim ne Universitetin POLIS nevojiten diploma e shkolles se mesme dhe rezultatet e Matures, dokument identifikimi, 2 fotografi, formular aplikimi, deshmi e gjuhes se huaj sipas kerkesave te MASR, mandat pagesa e tarifes administrative dhe mandat pagesa e tarifes semestrale.
answer_en: To register at POLIS University you will need: your high school diploma and Matura results, a valid ID document, 2 passport photos, a completed application form, proof of foreign language proficiency as required by the Ministry of Education, a payment receipt for the administrative fee, and a payment receipt for the semester fee.

questions: Si funksionon menyra e aplikimit ne POLIS?
How does the application process work at POLIS?
Si behet aplikimi ne Universitetin POLIS?
How to apply to POLIS University?
çfare duhet per tu regjistruar ne polis
answer: Aplikimi ne Universitetin POLIS behet fillimisht permes portalit U-Albania ose procedurave te Ministrise se Arsimit. Pas zgjedhjes se programit te studimit, studenti dorezon dokumentacionin perkates ne universitet dhe vazhdon proceduren e regjistrimit prane Zyres se Pranimeve. Mund te kontaktoni Zyren e Pranimeve ne admissions@universitetipolis.edu.al ose ne numrat +355 69 40 88 111 dhe +355 69 40 61 339. Gjithashtu mund te vizitoni faqen zyrtare www.universitetipolis.edu.al per informacion mbi afatet dhe dokumentacionin e kerkuar.
answer_en: Applying to POLIS University starts through the U-Albania portal or the Ministry of Education procedures. After selecting your study program, you submit the required documents to the university and complete registration at the Admissions Office. You can contact the Admissions Office at admissions@universitetipolis.edu.al or at +355 69 40 88 111 and +355 69 40 61 339. You can also visit www.universitetipolis.edu.al for information on deadlines and required documents.

questions: Cilat jane email-et zyrtare te Universitetit POLIS?
Si mund te dergoj email ne POLIS?
answer: Email-et zyrtare jane: info@universitetipolis.edu.al, contact@universitetipolis.edu.al dhe marketim@universitetipolis.edu.al.
answer_en: The official email addresses are: info@universitetipolis.edu.al, contact@universitetipolis.edu.al, and marketim@universitetipolis.edu.al.

answer: Email-i per aplikime eshte admissions@universitetipolis.edu.al.
answer_en: The email for applications is admissions@universitetipolis.edu.al.

questions: Cila eshte faqja zyrtare e Universitetit POLIS?
answer: Faqja zyrtare eshte www.universitetipolis.edu.al.
answer_en: The official website is www.universitetipolis.edu.al.

questions: Cfare programesh Bachelor ofron Universiteti POLIS?
What Bachelor programs does POLIS offer?
answer: Universiteti POLIS ofron programe Bachelor ne: Art dhe Dizajn, Inxhinieri Ndertimi, Shkenca Kompjuterike, Administrim Biznesi dhe Software Engineering & AI.
answer_en: POLIS University offers Bachelor programs in: Art and Design, Construction Engineering, Computer Science, Business Administration, and Software Engineering & AI.

questions: Sa kushton Bachelor ne Universitetin POLIS?
Cost of Bachelor studies at POLIS
sa kushton te studiosh ne polis
sa paguhet per semester ne polis
answer: Tarifat per Bachelor variojne nga 150 000 deri ne 195 000 leke per semester, ne varesi te programit.
answer_en: Bachelor tuition fees range from 150,000 to 195,000 Albanian Lek per semester, depending on the program.

questions: Sa kushton Bachelor ne Shkenca Kompjuterike?
Cost of Computer Science at POLIS
answer: Bachelor ne Shkenca Kompjuterike kushton 150 000 leke per semester.
answer_en: The Bachelor in Computer Science costs 150,000 Albanian Lek per semester.

questions: Sa kushton Bachelor ne Art dhe Dizajn?
sa kushton art dizajn ne polis
answer: Bachelor ne Art dhe Dizajn kushton 180 000 leke per semester.
answer_en: The Bachelor in Art and Design costs 180,000 Albanian Lek per semester.

questions: Sa kushton Bachelor ne Inxhinieri Ndertimi?
sa kushton inxhinieri ndertimi ne polis
answer: Bachelor ne Inxhinieri Ndertimi kushton 180 000 leke per semester.
answer_en: The Bachelor in Construction Engineering costs 180,000 Albanian Lek per semester.

questions: Sa kushton Bachelor ne Administrim Biznesi?
Cost of Business Administration at POLIS
answer: Bachelor ne Administrim Biznesi kushton 150 000 leke per semester.
answer_en: The Bachelor in Business Administration costs 150,000 Albanian Lek per semester.

questions: Sa kushton Bachelor ne Software Engineering dhe AI?
Cmimi i Software Engineering dhe AI
Cost of Software Engineering and AI
sa kushton software engineering ne polis
answer: Bachelor ne Software Engineering & AI kushton 150 000 leke per semester.
answer_en: The Bachelor in Software Engineering & AI costs 150,000 Albanian Lek per semester.

questions: Cfare programesh te integruara ofron Universiteti POLIS?
answer: Universiteti POLIS ofron programe 5-vjecare (te integruara) ne: Arkitekture dhe Dizajn Urban, dhe Planifikim dhe Menaxhim Urban.
answer_en: POLIS University offers 5-year (integrated) programs in: Architecture and Urban Design, and Urban Planning and Management.

questions: Sa kushton Arkitektura dhe Dizajni Urban?
Cmimi i Arkitekture dhe Dizajn Urban
sa kushton planifikim urban ne polis
answer: Programet e integruara ne Arkitekture dhe Dizajn Urban dhe Planifikim dhe Menaxhim Urban kushtojne 195 000 leke per semester.
answer_en: The integrated programs in Architecture and Urban Design and Urban Planning and Management cost 195,000 Albanian Lek per semester.

questions: What Master programs does POLIS offer?
answer: Universiteti POLIS ofron programe Master ne fusha si Arkitekture, Dizajn Urban, Planifikim Urban, Menaxhim Biznesi dhe fusha te tjera te lidhura. Per informacion te detajuar mbi programet aktuale Master, kontaktoni Zyren e Pranimeve ne admissions@universitetipolis.edu.al.
answer_en: POLIS University offers Master programs in fields such as Architecture, Urban Design, Urban Planning, Business Management, and other related areas. For detailed information on current Master programs, contact the Admissions Office at admissions@universitetipolis.edu.al.

questions: Ku mund ta gjej POLIS ne rrjete sociale?
answer: Universiteti POLIS eshte aktiv ne rrjetet sociale. Mund ta gjeni ne Facebook dhe Instagram duke kerkuar 'Universiteti POLIS'. Per informacion zyrtar vizitoni gjithashtu www.universitetipolis.edu.al.
answer_en: POLIS University is active on social media. You can find them on Facebook and Instagram by searching 'Universiteti POLIS'. For official information also visit www.universitetipolis.edu.al.

questions: A eshte i akredituar Universiteti POLIS?
answer: Universiteti POLIS eshte institucion i akredituar ne Republiken e Shqiperise. Per informacion te detajuar mbi akreditimin dhe njohjen nderkombetare te diplomave, vizitoni www.universitetipolis.edu.al ose kontaktoni ne info@universitetipolis.edu.al.
answer_en: POLIS University is an accredited institution in the Republic of Albania. For detailed information on accreditation and international recognition of degrees, visit www.universitetipolis.edu.al or contact info@universitetipolis.edu.al.

questions: A ka evente ne Universitetin POLIS?
Cfare mund te bejne studentet jashte mesimit?
A ka klube studentore ne POLIS?
What student activities are available at POLIS?
answer: Universiteti POLIS organizon aktivitete te shumta akademike, kulturore, artistike dhe sportive gjate vitit akademik. Studentet mund te marrin pjese ne konferenca, workshop-e, hackathon-e, Open Days, aktivitete sociale dhe evente kulturore. Universiteti ka gjithashtu klube studentore si Klubi i Sportit 'Get Fit & Fun', Klubi i Aktiviteteve Artistike, Klubi i Aktiviteteve Social-Kulturore dhe Klubi 'Walking The City'. Aktivitetet perfshijne debate, ture edukative, aktivitete vullnetare, kompeticione sportive, festivale artistike dhe evente te ndryshme studentore.
answer_en: POLIS University organizes a wide range of academic, cultural, artistic, and sports activities throughout the academic year. Students can participate in conferences, workshops, hackathons, Open Days, social activities, and cultural events. The university also offers student clubs such as the 'Get Fit & Fun' Sports Club, Artistic Activities Club, Social-Cultural Activities Club, and the 'Walking The City' Club. Activities include debates, educational tours, volunteer initiatives, sports competitions, artistic festivals, and various student events.

questions: A ofron POLIS transport per studentet?
Si mund te shkoj ne Universitetin POLIS?
A ka autobus per ne POLIS?
Cilat jane oraret e autobuseve te POLIS?
How can students reach POLIS University?
answer: Universiteti POLIS ofron transport te dedikuar per studentet permes linjave POLIS BUS. Autobuset nisen nga Tirana ne oraret 07:15, 09:15 dhe 12:00, ndersa kthimet nga kampusi realizohen ne oraret 13:00 dhe 17:00. Studentet mund te perdorin gjithashtu linjat publike te Vores dhe Kasharit. Universiteti ofron edhe hapesire parkimi me kapacitet te kufizuar per studentet qe perdorin automjete private.
answer_en: POLIS University provides dedicated transportation services for students through POLIS BUS lines. Buses depart from Tirana at 07:15, 09:15, and 12:00, while return trips from the campus operate at 13:00 and 17:00. Students can also use the public Vora and Kashar bus lines. The university also provides limited parking space for students using private vehicles.

questions: Si mund te perfitoj burse ne POLIS?
Cilat jane bursat ne Universitetin POLIS?
A ka ulje tarifash per studentet?
Kush mund te perfitoje burse ne POLIS?
answer: Po, Universiteti POLIS ofron bursa dhe ulje tarifash per studentet. Kategorite kryesore jane: studente me rezultate te larta akademike, studente nga e njejta familje dhe studente nga shtresat sociale ne nevoje. Per te perfituar burse, kandidatet duhet te plotesojne kriteret e percaktuara nga universiteti dhe te paraqesin dokumentacionin perkates gjate procesit te aplikimit. Studentet me mesatare te larte mund te perfitojne ulje te tarifes, ndersa kategori te vecanta mund te perfitojne mbeshtetje shtese sipas politikave te universitetit.
answer_en: Yes, POLIS University offers scholarships and tuition fee reductions. The main categories include high-achieving students, students from the same family, and students from disadvantaged social backgrounds. To receive a scholarship, applicants must meet the university's eligibility criteria and submit the required documentation during the application process. Students with strong academic performance may receive tuition discounts, while special categories may receive additional financial support according to university policies.

questions: Cilat jane kriteret per burse ne POLIS?
Cfare duhet per te marre burse?
answer: Per te perfituar burse ne Universitetin POLIS, studentet duhet te plotesojne kriteret e percaktuara nga universiteti. Studentet ekselente duhet te kene mesatare te larte dhe rezultate te mira ne procesin e pranimit. Bursa mund te jepet edhe per studente nga e njejta familje ose per studente nga shtresa sociale ne nevoje. Dokumentacioni perkates duhet te dorezohet gjate aplikimit.
answer_en: To receive a scholarship at POLIS University, students must meet the eligibility criteria established by the university. Excellent students should have strong academic performance and good admission results. Scholarships may also be granted to students from the same family or from disadvantaged social groups. Supporting documentation must be submitted during the application process.

questions: A merr pjese POLIS ne programin Erasmus?
A mund te studioj jashte vendit me POLIS?
Can I study abroad through POLIS?
answer: Po. Universiteti POLIS merr pjese aktivisht ne programet Erasmus+ dhe ofron mundesi mobiliteti per studentet dhe stafin akademik ne universitete partnere ne vende te ndryshme evropiane. Studentet mund te kryejne nje semester studimi ose praktike profesionale jashte vendit ne kuader te programeve Erasmus+, sipas thirrjeve dhe kritereve te publikuara nga universiteti.
answer_en: Yes. POLIS University actively participates in Erasmus+ programs and offers mobility opportunities for students and academic staff through partner universities across Europe. Students can study abroad for a semester or complete internships through Erasmus+ mobility calls, according to the requirements and opportunities announced by the university.

questions: Si aplikohet per Erasmus ne POLIS?
Si mund te marr pjese ne Erasmus?
How to apply for Erasmus at POLIS?
answer: Per te aplikuar ne programet Erasmus+ te POLIS, studentet duhet te ndjekin thirrjet e publikuara nga universiteti dhe te dorezojne dokumentacionin e kerkuar. Zakonisht dokumentet perfshijne formular aplikimi, vertetim studenti, liste notash, CV ne anglisht, kopje pasaporte dhe deshmi te njohjes se gjuhes angleze. Ne disa programe mund te kerkohet edhe portfolio ose leter motivimi.
answer_en: To apply for Erasmus+ opportunities at POLIS University, students must follow the official mobility calls and submit the required documents. These usually include an application form, student certificate, transcript of records, CV in English, passport copy, and proof of English language proficiency. Some programs may also require a portfolio or motivation letter.

questions: Ne cilat vende mund te shkoj me Erasmus?
Ku mund te studioj me Erasmus?
answer: Universiteti POLIS bashkepunon me universitete partnere ne vende te ndryshme evropiane si Gjermania, Italia, Franca, Portugalia, Austria, Greqia, Letonia, Holanda dhe vende te tjera. Mundesite e mobilitetit ndryshojne sipas thirrjeve Erasmus+ dhe marreveshjeve aktive te universitetit.
answer_en: POLIS University collaborates with partner universities in several European countries, including Germany, Italy, France, Portugal, Austria, Greece, Latvia, the Netherlands, and others. Mobility opportunities depend on the active Erasmus+ calls and agreements available during each academic year.

questions: A jane te financuara programet Erasmus?
answer: Shume nga programet Erasmus+ te ofruara nga Universiteti POLIS perfshijne bursa ose mbeshtetje financiare per studentet e perzgjedhur. Niveli i financimit varet nga programi, universiteti prites dhe rregullat e projektit Erasmus+ perkatese.
answer_en: Many Erasmus+ mobility opportunities offered through POLIS University include scholarships or financial support for selected students. The amount of funding depends on the specific mobility program, host institution, and Erasmus+ project regulations.

questions: Si i ndihmon POLIS studentet per punesim?
A mund te gjej pune permes POLIS?
Does POLIS help students find jobs?
answer: Po. Universiteti POLIS ofron mbeshtetje per zhvillimin e karrieres permes Office of Student Support and Career Counselling (OSSCC). Zyra ndihmon studentet me orientimin profesional, keshillimin per karrieren, lidhjen me tregun e punes dhe zhvillimin e aftesive profesionale gjate dhe pas studimeve.
answer_en: Yes. POLIS University provides career development support through the Office of Student Support and Career Counselling (OSSCC). The office helps students with career guidance, professional counselling, connections to the labor market, and professional development during and after their studies.

questions: Cfare eshte Office of Student Support and Career Counselling?
Office of Student Support and Career Counselling information
answer: Office of Student Support and Career Counselling (OSSCC) eshte nje strukture e Universitetit POLIS qe ofron mbeshtetje akademike dhe profesionale per studentet. Zyra ndihmon ne orientimin e karrieres, zhvillimin profesional, keshillimin individual dhe grupor, si dhe ne krijimin e lidhjeve me tregun e punes dhe komunitetin e alumni-ve.
answer_en: The Office of Student Support and Career Counselling (OSSCC) is a POLIS University unit that provides academic and professional support to students. The office assists with career guidance, professional development, individual and group counselling, and connections with the labor market and alumni community.

answer: Po. Universiteti POLIS disponon biblioteke per studentet dhe stafin akademik. Biblioteka ofron akses ne libra, materiale akademike dhe sherbime mbeshtetese per studim dhe kerkime shkencore. Studentet mund te perdorin burimet e bibliotekes gjate studimeve te tyre.
answer_en: Yes. POLIS University provides a library for students and academic staff. The library offers access to books, academic materials, and support services for study and research activities.

questions: A mund te marr libra nga biblioteka?
Mund te perdor librat e bibliotekes?
Can I borrow books from the library?
keywords: a marr dot libra ne biblioteke
answer: Po. Studentet kane akses ne koleksionet e bibliotekes se Universitetit POLIS dhe mund te perdorin materialet akademike sipas rregullave te bibliotekes. Stafi i bibliotekes ofron gjithashtu mbeshtetje per gjetjen dhe perdorimin e burimeve akademike.
answer_en: Yes. Students have access to the POLIS University library collections and may use academic materials according to library regulations. Library staff also provide assistance in finding and using academic resources.

questions: A mund te aksesoj materiale online?
answer: Po. Studentet e Universitetit POLIS kane akses ne burime elektronike dhe materiale akademike online nepermjet sherbimeve te universitetit dhe email-it institucional. Keto burime mbeshtesin studimin, kerkimin shkencor dhe aktivitetet akademike.
answer_en: Yes. POLIS University students have access to electronic resources and online academic materials through university services and their institutional email accounts. These resources support learning, research, and academic activities.

answer: Senati Studentor eshte organi perfaqesues i studenteve ne Universitetin POLIS. Ai promovon interesat e studenteve, organizon aktivitete sociale, kulturore dhe sportive, si dhe bashkepunon me strukturat e universitetit per te permiresuar jeten studentore.
answer_en: The Student Senate is the representative body of students at POLIS University. It promotes student interests, organizes social, cultural, and sports activities, and collaborates with university structures to improve student life.

answer: Perfaqesuesit e studenteve ne Universitetin POLIS zgjidhen ne menyre demokratike sipas rregulloreve te universitetit. Studentet perfaqesohen nga senatorët e klasave, Presidenti i Senatit Studentor, Sekretari Organizativ dhe perfaqesues te tjere ne strukturat universitare.
answer_en: Student representatives at POLIS University are elected democratically according to university regulations. Students are represented by class senators, the President of the Student Senate, the Organizational Secretary, and other representatives within university structures.

questions: A mund te marr pjese ne klube?
answer: Po. Universiteti POLIS ofron klube dhe organizata studentore ku studentet mund te angazhohen ne aktivitete sociale, kulturore, artistike dhe sportive. Regjistrimi ne klube zakonisht behet permes njoftimeve te Senatit Studentor ose koordinatoreve te aktiviteteve studentore.
answer_en: Yes. POLIS University offers student clubs and organizations where students can participate in social, cultural, artistic, and sports activities. Registration is usually done through announcements from the Student Senate or student activity coordinators.

answer: Universiteti POLIS eshte nje institucion i arsimit te larte privat ne Tirane, Shqiperi, i specializuar ne arkitekture, planifikim urban, dizajn, inxhinieri, teknologji dhe biznes. Ofron programe Bachelor dhe Master ne disa fusha. Per me shume informacion vizitoni www.universitetipolis.edu.al.
answer_en: POLIS University is a private higher education institution in Tirana, Albania, specializing in architecture, urban planning, design, engineering, technology, and business. It offers Bachelor and Master programs across several fields. For more information visit www.universitetipolis.edu.al.
